name: naay-agent
description: Agente conversacional IA integrado con Shopify + Supabase + pgvector

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:admin && npm run sync:frontend
scripts.sync:frontend: cp -r backend/public/app backend/dist/public/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'Frontend sync skipped'
scripts.postinstall: echo '📦 Azure postinstall: $(date)' && echo 'Dependencies installed successfully'
scripts.azure:install: echo '🔧 Azure: Installing dependencies...' && npm install --production && cd backend && npm install --production && cd ../frontend-admin && npm install --production
scripts.azure:build: echo '🔨 Azure: Building...' && cd frontend-admin && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
scripts.azure:setup: npm run azure:install && npm run azure:build
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:admin
scripts.verify:sync: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const src=fs.statSync('backend/public/naay-widget.js').size; const dist=fs.statSync('backend/dist/public/naay-widget.js').size; console.log('Source:', src, 'bytes, Dist:', dist, 'bytes', src===dist ? '✅ SYNCED' : '❌ OUT OF SYNC');"

author: Ignacio Ortiz
